name: carniceria-app
description: App de gestión para carnicerías — offline-first, Electron + React

scripts.dev:sandbox: cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=sandbox VITE_APP_ENV=sandbox pnpm run build:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=sandbox VITE_APP_ENV=sandbox concurrently -k "pnpm run build:electron:watch" "pnpm run vite:dev" "pnpm run electron:dev"
scripts.dev:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=production VITE_APP_ENV=production pnpm run build:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=production VITE_APP_ENV=production concurrently -k "pnpm run build:electron:watch" "pnpm run vite:dev" "pnpm run electron:dev"
scripts.dev:fieldtest: cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=fieldtest VITE_APP_ENV=fieldtest KRETZ_PORT=COM3 SAM4S_IP= SAM4S_USER= SAM4S_PASSWORD= pnpm run build:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_ENV=fieldtest VITE_APP_ENV=fieldtest KRETZ_PORT=COM3 SAM4S_IP= SAM4S_USER= SAM4S_PASSWORD= concurrently -k "pnpm run build:electron:watch" "pnpm run vite:dev" "pnpm run electron:dev"
scripts.build:prod: cross-env APP_ENV=production VITE_APP_ENV=production pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:renderer && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:sandbox: cross-env APP_ENV=sandbox VITE_APP_ENV=sandbox pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:renderer && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.db:migrate:sandbox: pnpm run build:main && cross-env APP_ENV=sandbox ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-electron/electron/db/migrate-cli.js
scripts.db:migrate:fieldtest: pnpm run build:main && cross-env APP_ENV=fieldtest ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-electron/electron/db/migrate-cli.js
scripts.seed:sandbox: pnpm run build:main && cross-env APP_ENV=sandbox ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-electron/electron/db/seed-sandbox.js
scripts.seed:fieldtest: pnpm run build:main && cross-env APP_ENV=fieldtest ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist-electron/electron/db/seed-sandbox.js
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.renderer.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --coverage && vitest run --config vitest.config.renderer.ts --coverage
